[[Lord/Legends|Lord]] '''Hoall''' was a [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]] [[Tapani Noble Houses|noble]]. At one point, he was pressed for information by a HoloVid gossip columnist, who interpreted his response as a "no comment."
